CustomField.description: Parsing text where the user can define the condition for the notification - parse field names and logic operators. (where condition)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use this field to restrict ("filter") the records that the Notification or Task applies to. e.g. to send a Notification or to create a Task only for leases that have Active checkbox checked, write "leaseworks_ _active_ _c = true". Refer to the Knowledgebase for more details.
CustomField.label: Record Filter Criteria
